creator: mohacsi@niif.hu
text:
Dear All,

1. The update seems to be fine to me. Thanks for the good work.
2. I wanted to make an update, but name change to limesurvey seemed more
complicated. I would prefer to rename it limesurvey (committers had to
make repocopy).
3. In case of name change I would change some elements in Wen Heping's
patch:

DISTNAME=       ${PORTNAME}${PORTVERSION:S^.^^}_build6506_20090310


WRKSRC=         ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}

and probably:

PHPSURVEYORURL?=        ${PORTNAME}

Thanks,
          Janos Mohacsi
